title: If the Angels made it to Adam
display_title: If the Angels made it to Adam
wikitext:
[]: If the Angels made it to Adam...             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Tue Aug 25, 2009 11:56 pm What would have happened? The obvious answer is 3I, but I mean, what would Adam have done with us after melting us into LCL? It couldn't destroy the souls lost in 2I, merely scatter them.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Wed Aug 26, 2009 12:17 am Option 1: Turn us all into LCL that WASN'T undergoing Instrumentality. Option 2: Put us in the same kind of stasis similar to Adam's 4B year sleep. Option 3: Perhaps Adam failed at destroying stuff because it was going haywire, and with an Angel to balance things out, would be able to destroy our souls instead of blowing up.

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Wed Aug 26, 2009 2:37 am Maybe we would have all just gone back to Lilith. Legendary wrote: Perhaps Adam failed at destroying stuff because it was going haywire, and with an Angel to balance things out, would be able to destroy our souls instead of blowing up.

[]:             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Wed Aug 26, 2009 11:57 am Is it possible that Adam would have shoved us into Angelic bodies?

[]:             Quote Post by Holy Diver » Wed Aug 26, 2009 3:21 pm CyberXIII wrote: Is it possible that Adam would have shoved us into Angelic bodies?

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Wed Aug 26, 2009 3:29 pm CyberXIII wrote: Is it possible that Adam would have shoved us into Angelic bodies?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Aug 26, 2009 5:43 pm All life, progeny of Lilith, would be gone. There would be no instrumentality. Lilim souls would just be disembodied. There would be no body to come back to, Adam's 3I would essentially finish what was started during 2I, reformat the planet for Adam's progeny. Adam has its own chamber of guf, where, presumably, it has souls for its progeny. 2I failed presumably because 1) it was caused by lilim, not a natural occurence for Adam, and 2) it was somewhat thwarted by the Katsuragi team when they realized how wrong things were going, limiting the damage to only Antarctica. See: the CI, Fuyu's talk about the "dead sea" i.e. Antartica, and the gibberish during the beginning of 21'

Article: If the Angels made it to Adam
 started during 2I, reformat the planet for Adam's progeny. Adam has its own chamber of guf, where, presumably, it has souls for its progeny. 2I failed presumably because 1) it was caused by lilim, not a natural occurence for Adam, and 2) it was somewhat thwarted by the Katsuragi team when they realized how wrong things were going, limiting the damage to only Antarctica. See: the CI, Fuyu's talk about the "dead sea" i.e. Antartica, and the gibberish during the beginning of 21'
